name: Park Regis Kris Kin Hotel

language.#text: The Park Regis Kris Kin Hotel Dubai is a luxury hotel located in the heart of Dubai's central business district, a 4-minute walk from BurJuman Mall and a short drive from Dubai Museum.  It offers easy access to major attractions including the Dubai Mall, Mall of the Emirates, Gold Souk, Dubai Creek, Jumeirah Beach, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai International Exhibition Centre, and Dubai World Trade Centre (a 10-minute drive).  The hotel features 384 air-conditioned rooms with LCD televisions, complimentary wired and wireless internet access, satellite programming, separate bathtubs and showers, bidets, hair dryers, phones, safes, and desks.  Amenities include a rooftop pool with city views, a full-service spa offering body treatments and facials, a fitness center, a nightclub, a coffee shop/cafe, three restaurants (including Tenggara), two bars/lounges, 24-hour room service, a 24-hour business center, concierge services, a hair salon, dry cleaning/laundry services, and five meeting rooms.  Continental breakfast is available for a fee.  Free self-parking is available onsite, and a 24-hour airport shuttle is offered for a surcharge.  Some rooms offer blackout curtains, a refrigerator, instant coffee/tea, and a bedside panel controlling lighting and air conditioning.  Smoking is permitted in designated areas.

The Park Regis Kris Kin Hotel is a Business, City hotel, Design Trendy, Eco Friendly, Family Style, Full Service, Honeymoon, Leisure, Modern, Tourist hotel. The nightlife/restaurants are Night Club the hotel.

shortDescription: The Park Regis Kris Kin Hotel Dubai is a luxury hotel located in the heart of Dubai's central business district, a 4-minute walk from BurJuman Mall and a short drive from Dubai Museum.  It offers easy access to major attractions including the Dubai Mall, Mall of the Emirates, Gold Souk, Dubai Creek, Jumeirah Beach, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai International Exhibition Centre, and Dubai World Trade Centre (a 10-minute drive).  The hotel features 384 air-conditioned rooms with LCD televisions, complimentary wired and wireless internet access, satellite programming, separate bathtubs and showers, bidets, hair dryers, phones, safes, and desks.  Amenities include a rooftop pool with city views, a full-service spa offering body treatments and facials, a fitness center, a nightclub, a coffee shop/cafe, three restaurants (including Tenggara), two bars/lounges, 24-hour room service, a 24-hour business center, concierge services, a hair salon, dry cleaning/laundry services, and five meeting rooms.  Continental breakfast is available for a fee.  Free self-parking is available onsite, and a 24-hour airport shuttle is offered for a surcharge.  Some rooms offer blackout curtains, a refrigerator, instant coffee/tea, and a bedside panel controlling lighting and air conditioning.  Smoking is permitted in designated areas.

roomTypes.roomDescription: This suite features a double bed, a single bed, two armchairs, a coffee table, and a workspace.  Amenities include a bathroom with a bidet, separate shower and bathtub, complimentary Wi-Fi, TV, a safe, and bedside controls for air conditioning, a wake-up alarm, and a do-not-disturb indicator. A minibar is available upon request.
